meta.title: FreshMilk | Content product studio behind Storit
meta.description: Building Storit, a webtoon fandom community, and daily content products from Pohang · Handong University incubator.

hero.title:
Break the line.
Let the market
define us.
hero.subtitle: From our main product Storit, we experiment with content people visit every day — based in Pohang.

about.heading:
We experiment with content
people visit every day.
about.lead: Started in December 2025 at the Handong University incubator. Storit is our focus, with tolli and Picktory running in parallel as we watch what the market responds to.
about.missionText: Blend technology and content trends to deliver joy to people.
about.visionText: Content platforms people visit every day
about.storyP1: FreshMilk builds experiences people return to daily — webtoon fandom, K-content, and habit-forming learning.
about.storyP2: Rather than betting on one idea, we run small experiments in parallel and double down on what the market validates.

projects.featureLead: Webtoon quiz reward fandom community — main product
projects.mainCopy: From reading webtoons to playing them. A community where quizzes and rewards bring fans together.
projects.mainFeature1: Webtoon-based quizzes let fans participate directly
projects.mainFeature2: Rewards for answers and engagement keep the community active
projects.mainFeature3: Beta in 2026 — web and app in parallel
projects.p2Copy: A daily verse at your fingertips. Bible memorization, game-like.
projects.p3Copy: K-content through guessing. Prediction and reasoning for fans.
projects.econoupTeaser: econoup — five minutes of economics daily, habit-forming learning app (working title · ideating)

team.heading: Two co-founders.
team.m1Bio: Product execution and team ops. Ships and validates fast with Storit at the center.
team.m2Bio: Planning and experiment design. Turns user feedback into product direction quickly.

updates.heading: Recent updates
updates.u1Text: Company site refresh · Storit beta prep in full swing
updates.u2Text: Parallel development kickoff for tolli, Picktory, and econoup

contact.heading: Looking for people to experiment with.
contact.subtitle: Partnerships, collabs, beta access, and general inquiries welcome.
